title: Continental Journeys
description: Craft your adventure in a world full of endless possibilities!
body:
Craft your adventures and lore with this modpack! A World Full of Endless Possibilities!

This modpack uses mods to enhance the feeling of an adventure.


[Continents](https://modrinth.com/mod/continents)

[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)

Yungs' Mods

[CTOV - Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)


and a lot more...!

Feel free to use your shaders and or texture packs.
